frontmatter.excerpt: In recent years, quantum computing has made significant progress in both hardware and software. However, executing quantum algorithms efficiently on physical systems still requires a crucial compilation step to translate logical quantum circuits into hardware-executable instructions — a field that remains in its early stages.
frontmatter.title: Quantum compilation with neutral atoms

frontmatter.excerpt: 近年来，量子计算在硬件和软件两方面都取得了显著进展。然而，要在物理系统上高效执行量子算法，仍然需要关键的编译步骤，将逻辑量子线路转换为硬件可执行的指令。这个方向目前仍处于较早期阶段。
frontmatter.title: 中性原子平台上的量子编译

frontmatter.excerpt: 半导体量子比特是量子计算的有力候选平台，因为它们兼容现有半导体制造工艺，具有较长相干时间，并有望实现大规模集成。然而，构建稳健的半导体自旋量子计算机仍面临显著挑战，其中最紧迫的问题之一是噪声，尤其是电荷噪声。为了解决这一关键问题，首先需要研究并理解电荷噪声的底层机制。
frontmatter.title: 半导体量子比特中的电荷噪声

frontmatter.excerpt: Semiconductor qubits are a promising candidate for quantum computing, owing to their compatibility with existing semiconductor fabrication techniques, long coherence times, and scalability for large-scale integration. However, building a robust quantum computer with semiconductor spin qubits faces significant challenges, the most pressing being noise—particularly charge noise. To address this critical ssue, it is essential to first study and understand the underlying mechanisms of charge noise.
frontmatter.title: Charge noise in semiconductor qubits

frontmatter.excerpt: Quantum operations with multiple trapped-ions rely on the collective vibrational modes of the ion chain, known as phonons. Critical parameters such as ion positions, phonon frequencies, and the strength of ion-phonon interactions are closely related to the structure of the ion trap chip, the surrounding environment, and the configuration of the trapping potential. To achieve high-performance trapped-ion quantum computing, precise calibration of system parameters is essential.
frontmatter.title: Automatic calibration for trapped-ion systems

frontmatter.excerpt: 多个囚禁离子的量子操作依赖离子链的集体振动模式，也就是声子。离子位置、声子频率以及离子-声子相互作用强度等关键参数，与离子阱芯片结构、周围环境和囚禁势配置密切相关。为了实现高性能离子阱量子计算，精确校准系统参数至关重要。
frontmatter.title: 离子阱系统的自动校准
